hero.badge: MSc Cyber Security Research — Coventry University
hero.subtitle: AIPET automates the discovery, testing, and prioritisation of vulnerabilities across your IoT devices — with explainable AI that tells you not just what is vulnerable, but exactly why.

features.attackModulesDesc: MQTT, CoAP, HTTP, Firmware, Recon — full IoT coverage out of the box.
features.explainableAIDesc: SHAP-powered predictions tell you exactly why each device is at risk.
features.owaspDesc: Complete coverage of all 10 OWASP IoT vulnerability categories.
features.dashboardDesc: Live scan status, findings, and AI analysis in one place.
features.apiDesc: Integrate AIPET into your CI/CD pipelines with API key access.
features.reportsDesc: Professional assessment reports ready to share with clients.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you need more.
